name: GEORGE RISK INDUSTRIES, INC.
summary: George Risk Industries, Inc. (GRI), incorporated in 1967 in Colorado, designs, manufactures, and sells security alarm components and systems, custom computer keyboards, proximity switches, pool access alarms, EZ Duct wire covers, water sensors, electronic switching devices, high security switches, and cable/wire installation tools. The security division comprises approximately 96% of net revenues, selling to distributors and alarm dealers. Key customers include Ademco, Inc. and Anixter, Inc.

products.name: Security Alarm Components and Systems
products.description: Components and systems for security and burglar alarm applications sold to distributors and alarm dealers.

products.name: Custom Computer Keyboards
products.description: Custom keyboards designed and manufactured to OEM specifications and as off-the-shelf proprietary designs.

products.name: Proximity Switches
products.description: Electronic proximity switching devices sold primarily to original equipment manufacturers.

products.name: Pool Access Alarms
products.description: Alarms designed for pool access security applications.

products.name: EZ Duct Wire Covers
products.description: Wire cover products for cable and wire management.

products.name: Water Sensors
products.description: Electronic sensors designed to detect water presence.

products.name: Cable and Wire Installation Tools
products.description: Tools designed for wire and cable installation.

partnerships.description: Written distribution agreement signed February 2011; Ademco accounts for approximately 38.6% of security division sales.
Distributor accounting for approximately 22.4% of security division sales.
Third-party IT service provider supporting cybersecurity monitoring, risk assessment, and compliance.
